## Type
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs / repo hygiene
- [ ] Contract change

## Verification
- [ ] `npm run lint -- --pretty false`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Contract compile/test if applicable

## Public repo safety
- [ ] No real `.env`, private keys, tokens, seed phrases, deployer secrets, or private ops files committed
- [ ] No on-chain tx, role change, contract deploy, or production deploy performed without explicit approval
- [ ] If contract addresses changed, deployment JSON + frontend config were verified
